scripts.test:packages: pnpm --dir packages/config run test && pnpm --dir packages/stores-core run test && pnpm --dir packages/asset-listings-state run test && pnpm --dir packages/lifecycle-core run test && pnpm --dir packages/lifecycle-wails run test
scripts.lint: pnpm run --dir website lint:fix && pnpm run --dir railyard/frontend lint:fix
scripts.format: pnpm run --dir website format && pnpm run --dir railyard/frontend format
scripts.ci: pnpm run --dir website ci && pnpm run --dir railyard/frontend ci
